ModMetaData.name: Turret Idle Position
ModMetaData.author: Mlie
ModMetaData.description:
[img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Self-Info.png[/img]
A mod I made after I overheard someone who wanted to make their turrets pointed away from their base when idle. You can set what degree the turret should point to a well as an optional allowed arc it can move in. Purely cosmetic, does not affect firing arc. Will also work on manned turrets that will reset to a position within the defined arc when unmanned.
I hope someone may find it useful!
[table] [tr] [td][url=https://discord.gg/h5TY6DA][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Discord.png[/img][/url][/td] [td][url=https://github.com/emipa606/TurretIdlePosition][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Github.png[/img][/url][/td] [/tr] [tr] [td][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/SafeToAdd.png[/img][/td] [td][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/SafeToRemove.png[/img][/td] [/tr] [/table]
[img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Self-SupportAndDonations.png[/img] Since modding is just a hobby for me I expect no donations to keep modding. If you still want to show your support you can gift me anything from my [url=https://store.steampowered.com/wishlist/id/Mlie]Wishlist[/url] or buy me a cup of tea.
[url=https://ko-fi.com/G2G55DDYD][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Kofi-Small.png[/img][/url]
[img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Self-ReportingIssues.png[/img] [list] [*] See if the the error persists if you just have this mod and its requirements active. [*] If not, try adding your other mods until it happens again. [*] Always post your log using the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2873415404]Log Uploader[/url] [*] For best support, please use the Discord-channel for error-reporting. [*] Do not report errors by making a discussion-thread, I get no notification of that. [*] If you have the solution for a problem, please post it to the GitHub repository. [*] Use [url=https://github.com/RimSort/RimSort/releases/latest]RimSort[/url] to sort your mods [/list]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3296768739][img]https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/emipa606/TurretIdlePosition?label=latest%20version&style=plastic&labelColor=0070cd&color=white[/img][/url] | tags: pointing direction, turret customization
